name: SOC: Data
description: Single data-plane story. Scheduled entry drives the Jira sync on cron. Webhook entry dispatches on body.action: sync_now, discover_projects, discover_statuses, settings_op, status_map_op, labels_op, annotations_op. Replaces the 4 CRUD stories, 2 discover stories, sync story, and compute-fan-out orchestrator.

agents.name: Scheduled start
agents.description: Cron entry. Attach a schedule (e.g. 0 * * * *) on this action in the Tines UI. Emits the canonical sync payload that feeds into Sync entry.

agents.name: Webhook (from Pages)
agents.description: All Page-driven actions enter here. Body shape: {action, ...params}. action in [sync_now, discover_projects, discover_statuses, settings_op, status_map_op, labels_op, annotations_op]. CRUD params: {op: get|set|delete|bulk_set, key?, value?, mappings?}. discover_statuses: {project_key}.

agents.name: Sync entry
agents.description: Canonical sync payload. Fed by either Scheduled start or the sync_now webhook branch. Downstream references sync_entry.*.

agents.name: Gate: project_key set
agents.description: Exits without work if no project has been configured.

agents.name: Mark sync running
agents.description: Updates soc_settings.last_sync_status = running.

payload.jql: =CONCAT('project = "', sync_entry.project_key, '" AND created >= "', sync_entry.start_date, '" ORDER BY created ASC')

agents.name: Jira search page
agents.description: One page of the sync. expand=changelog included so the backfill happens in a single pass.

agents.name: Normalize to TicketRow
agents.description: Flattens Jira issues to 17-field TicketRow shape; keeps only status changelog entries.

payload.tickets_page: =MAP(jira_search_page.body.issues, i, OBJECT('id', i.id, 'key', i.key, 'project_key', sync_entry.project_key, 'summary', i.fields.summary, 'status_name', i.fields.status.name, 'status_category_key', i.fields.status.statusCategory.key, 'issue_type', i.fields.issuetype.name, 'priority', IF(i.fields.priority, i.fields.priority.name, null), 'assignee', IF(i.fields.assignee, i.fields.assignee.displayName, null), 'reporter', IF(i.fields.reporter, i.fields.reporter.displayName, null), 'labels', i.fields.labels, 'components', MAP(i.fields.components, c, c.name), 'created_at', i.fields.created, 'updated_at', i.fields.updated, 'resolved_at', i.fields.resolutiondate, 'changelog_json', JSON_STRINGIFY(FILTER(MAP(i.changelog.histories, h, OBJECT('id', h.id, 'created', h.created, 'items', FILTER(h.items, it, it.field = 'status'))), hh, LENGTH(hh.items) > 0)), 'fetched_at', NOW()))

agents.name: More pages?
agents.description: Loop guard: continue paging when not last and under cap.

agents.name: Done paging
agents.description: Paging complete; proceed to write + compute.

agents.name: Write tickets cache
agents.description: Updates the soc_tickets_cache Resource via the Tines API.

agents.name: Mark sync ok
agents.description: Updates soc_settings on successful sync.

agents.name: Fetch projects
agents.description: Jira GET /rest/api/3/project/search (discover_projects).

agents.name: Shape projects response
agents.description: Returns {projects: [{id, key, name}]} for the Setup Page dropdown.

agents.name: Fetch project statuses
agents.description: Jira GET /rest/api/3/project/{key}/statuses (discover_statuses).

agents.name: Classify statuses
agents.description: Returns {discovered: [{status_name, category_key, suggested_classification, confidence, reason}]}.

payload.discovered: =MAP(FLATTEN(MAP(fetch_project_statuses.body, t, t.statuses)), s, OBJECT('status_name', s.name, 'category_key', s.statusCategory.key, 'suggested_classification', IF(s.statusCategory.key = 'new', 'queue', IF(s.statusCategory.key = 'indeterminate', 'active', IF(s.statusCategory.key = 'done', 'done', 'queue'))), 'confidence', IF(OR(s.statusCategory.key = 'new', s.statusCategory.key = 'done'), 'high', 'medium'), 'reason', 'Derived from Jira statusCategory.key.'))

agents.name: Compute next settings
agents.description: CRUD router for soc_settings. webhook.body.op in get|set|delete|bulk_set.

payload.next_value: =IF(webhook.body.op = 'set', MERGE(RESOURCE.soc_settings, OBJECT(webhook.body.key, webhook.body.value)), IF(webhook.body.op = 'delete', OMIT(RESOURCE.soc_settings, webhook.body.key), IF(webhook.body.op = 'bulk_set', MERGE(RESOURCE.soc_settings, webhook.body.mappings), RESOURCE.soc_settings)))

agents.name: Write settings
agents.description: Updates the soc_settings Resource via the Tines API.

agents.name: Respond settings
agents.description: Responds with current (get) or next_value (write).

agents.name: Compute next status_map
agents.description: CRUD router for soc_status_map. webhook.body.op in get|set|delete|bulk_set. Keys are '<projectKey>:<statusName>'.

payload.next_value: =IF(webhook.body.op = 'set', MERGE(RESOURCE.soc_status_map, OBJECT(webhook.body.key, webhook.body.value)), IF(webhook.body.op = 'delete', OMIT(RESOURCE.soc_status_map, webhook.body.key), IF(webhook.body.op = 'bulk_set', MERGE(RESOURCE.soc_status_map, webhook.body.mappings), RESOURCE.soc_status_map)))

agents.name: Write status_map
agents.description: Updates the soc_status_map Resource via the Tines API.

agents.name: Compute next labels
agents.description: CRUD router for soc_label_config.

payload.next_value: =IF(webhook.body.op = 'set', MERGE(RESOURCE.soc_label_config, OBJECT(webhook.body.key, webhook.body.value)), IF(webhook.body.op = 'delete', OMIT(RESOURCE.soc_label_config, webhook.body.key), IF(webhook.body.op = 'bulk_set', MERGE(RESOURCE.soc_label_config, webhook.body.mappings), RESOURCE.soc_label_config)))

agents.name: Write labels
agents.description: Updates the soc_label_config Resource via the Tines API.

agents.name: Compute next annotations
agents.description: CRUD router for soc_day_annotations. Keys are YYYY-MM-DD.

payload.next_value: =IF(webhook.body.op = 'set', MERGE(RESOURCE.soc_day_annotations, OBJECT(webhook.body.key, webhook.body.value)), IF(webhook.body.op = 'delete', OMIT(RESOURCE.soc_day_annotations, webhook.body.key), IF(webhook.body.op = 'bulk_set', MERGE(RESOURCE.soc_day_annotations, webhook.body.mappings), RESOURCE.soc_day_annotations)))

agents.name: Write annotations
agents.description: Updates the soc_day_annotations Resource via the Tines API.

agents.name: Webhook (from soc_data)
agents.description: Entry. Receives {project_key} from soc_data.Trigger_compute.

agents.name: Load inputs
agents.description: Reads tickets (handles sharded-mode Resource), status_map, label_config, settings.

agents.name: Compute headline
agents.description: Queue depth, active incidents, net velocity, TTFT percentiles. See docs/metric-mapping.md.

payload.headline: =OBJECT('queue_depth', LENGTH(FILTER(load_inputs.tickets, t, LOOKUP(load_inputs.status_map, CONCAT(t.project_key, ':', t.status_name), 'queue') = 'queue')), 'active_incident_count', LENGTH(FILTER(load_inputs.tickets, t, LOOKUP(load_inputs.status_map, CONCAT(t.project_key, ':', t.status_name), 'queue') = 'active')), 'ttft_p50_hours', PERCENTILE(FILTER(MAP(load_inputs.tickets, t, TTFT_HOURS(t)), v, v != null), 50), 'ttft_p85_hours', PERCENTILE(FILTER(MAP(load_inputs.tickets, t, TTFT_HOURS(t)), v, v != null), 85), 'ttft_p95_hours', PERCENTILE(FILTER(MAP(load_inputs.tickets, t, TTFT_HOURS(t)), v, v != null), 95), 'net_velocity_7d', (LENGTH(FILTER(load_inputs.tickets, t, AND(t.resolved_at != null, DATE_DIFF(NOW(), t.resolved_at, 'days') <= 7))) - LENGTH(FILTER(load_inputs.tickets, t, DATE_DIFF(NOW(), t.created_at, 'days') <= 7))) / 7)

agents.name: Compute flow
agents.description: Lead time decomposition, aging buckets, closure integrity, stalled tickets. Placeholder shape; fill formulas from docs/metric-mapping.md.

payload.flow: =OBJECT('lead_time', OBJECT('queue_wait', OBJECT('p50', 0, 'p85', 0, 'p95', 0), 'active_work', OBJECT('p50', 0, 'p85', 0, 'p95', 0), 'post_active_wait', OBJECT('p50', 0, 'p85', 0, 'p95', 0)), 'aging_buckets', ARRAY(), 'stalled_tickets', 0, 'closure_integrity', OBJECT('instant', 0, 'untouched', 0, 'normal', 0, 'churned', 0, 'still_open', 0))

agents.name: Compute speed
agents.description: Response time trend and closure bursts. Placeholder shape.

payload.speed: =OBJECT('ttft_percentiles', OBJECT('p50', null, 'p85', null, 'p95', null), 'response_time_trend', ARRAY(), 'closure_bursts', ARRAY())

agents.name: Compute capacity
agents.description: Shift rollover, after-hours transitions, staffing verdict, velocity under load. Placeholder shape.

agents.name: Compute patterns
agents.description: Cluster analysis, recurrence engine. Placeholder shape.

agents.name: Compute projections
agents.description: Linear regression projections. Placeholder shape.

agents.name: Compute calendar
agents.description: Per-day counts and top-N labels. Placeholder shape.

agents.name: Merge results
agents.description: Assembles the complete soc_metrics_cache payload.

agents.name: Write metrics cache
agents.description: Updates the soc_metrics_cache Resource via the Tines API.

agents.name: Webhook
agents.description: Body: {tier: 'settings' | 'everything'}.

agents.name: Reset settings
agents.description: Updates the soc_settings Resource via the Tines API.

payload.value: =OBJECT('project_key', null, 'jira_domain', RESOURCE.soc_settings.jira_domain, 'sync_interval_minutes', 60, 'date_range_days', 90, 'first_sync_completed_at', null, 'last_sync_completed_at', null, 'last_sync_status', 'idle', 'last_sync_error', null, 'business_hours', RESOURCE.soc_settings.business_hours, 'max_issues_per_sync', 10000, 'page_size', 100, 'rate_limit_delay_ms', 200, 'calendar_view_month', null)

agents.name: Reset status map
agents.description: Updates the soc_status_map Resource via the Tines API.

agents.name: Reset labels
agents.description: Updates the soc_label_config Resource via the Tines API.

agents.name: Reset annotations
agents.description: Updates the soc_day_annotations Resource via the Tines API.

agents.name: Reset tickets cache
agents.description: Updates the soc_tickets_cache Resource via the Tines API.

agents.name: Reset metrics cache
agents.description: Updates the soc_metrics_cache Resource via the Tines API.
